title: Sacromonte, los sabios de la tribu
original_title: Sacromonte, los sabios de la tribu
overview: This documentary is a effort to recover the memory of The Sacromonte, a suburb of Granada city. Chus Gutiérrez researches the relation between the suburb and the flamenco.
